title: Blockchain World State Representation
description: A diagram illustrating the concept of the world state in a blockchain, showing how it is a snapshot of all current account balances and smart contract storage at a specific block height, derived from the transaction history.
relationships: The Ledger contains the entire history of transactions
The World State is a cached representation derived from applying all transactions in the Ledger up to a specific block
The World State is a mapping of Account Addresses to their current state (balance and data)
